turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hello mrs. lee , the doctor sees mrs. lee is here for back pain .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , the doctor is seeing mrs. lee today for , uh , back pain . mrs. lee's a 40-year-old female . so can the patient tell the doctor what happened to mrs. lee ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes . mrs. lee was at a birthday party and the birthday party was surprise party . so mrs. lee and other people at the birthday party were all like crunched behind and hiding . and when the person came in mrs. lee and other people at the birthday party all jumped out , and then mrs. lee fell down the little stair and mrs. lee rammed mrs. lee's back into the railing of the s- , uh , staircase .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so the surprise party was a surprise for mrs. lee too ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes the surprise party was .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: very good . okay . so , um , did mrs. lee's back hurt because mrs. lee hit mrs. lee's back , or did mrs. lee twist ? what happened when mrs. lee ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mrs. lee thinks the surprise party injury was mrs. lee's motion-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: . of jumping up , or something .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and maybe a twisting .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . any pain shooting down mrs. lee's legs at all ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: is the back pain on one side or the other of mrs. lee's back ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , the back pain is more on the right .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: on the right . is there anything that makes the back pain better or worse ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , if mrs. lee is lying flat the back pain hurts a little more , and any twisting motion for sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and does mrs. lee have any history or any back problems before ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mrs. lee did . mrs. lee had a fusion done .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , yeah that lumbar fusion . um , let's take an x-ray . hey . or let's look at an x-ray . hey dragon , show the doctor the latest x-ray . okay , the doctor can see where mrs. lee had mrs. lee's fusion , t4 here on the x-ray . but the doctor do n't see anything that looks , um , significantly abnormal . the x-ray does n't appear to have any compression fractures or anything like that . so , the x-ray is essentially , except for the fusion , a normal exam . let the doctor do mrs. lee's exam for mrs. lee here . can the doctor have mrs. lee stand up please ? does mrs. lee's back hurt when the doctor twists mrs. lee that way ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . mrs. lee can sit back down . if the doctor lifts mrs. lee's leg here , does lifting mrs. lee's leg bother mrs. lee ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how 'bout when the doctor lifts this leg ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: any pain shooting down mrs. lee's legs when the doctor does lifting mrs. lee's leg ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and can mrs. lee feel the doctor touching down here .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . so , mrs. lee had a injury to mrs. lee's back when mrs. lee was twisting at the birthday party . mrs. lee do n't really have any pain or numbness down mrs. lee's legs . mrs. lee have some stiffness with rotation , um , but mrs. lee do n't have any evidence of a , um , what the doctor would call a pinched nerved or radiculopathy . so , the doctor think mrs. lee basically have a strain of mrs. lee's lower back . um , has mrs. lee been taking any medications ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: just some ibuprofen .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and does mrs. lee have any other , um , medical problems ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um mrs. lee take medication for anxiety .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and that's all ? okay . um , so what the doctor and mrs. lee're gon na do is the doctor is gon na give mrs. lee , um , just continue the motrin at 800mg , three times a day , with food . the doctor want mrs. lee to use some ice and heat , alternating on mrs. lee's back . but the doctor do want mrs. lee walking .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , and , uh , the lower back strain should sort of take care of the lower back strain itself after a few days . if the lower back strain is not , or the lower back strain is getting worse , the doctor want mrs. lee to come back and see the doctor over the next week .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does the plan sound good ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the plan does .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , dragon . hey dragon , go ahead and order the medications and procedures and close out the note . come on the doctor'll bring mrs. lee out to check out .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank you .
